sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_points (id UInt64, lon Float64, lat Float64, s2Index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_points (id, lon, lat, s2Index) VALUES (1, 37.79506683, 55.71290588, geoToS2(37.79506683, 55.71290588));
UPDATE geo_points SET s2Index = geoToS2(lon, lat) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, lon, lat, s2Index FROM geo_points WHERE s2Index = geoToS2(37.79506683, 55.71290588);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_points WHERE s2Index > 0;
